_allow-open-disputes-reason: Dispute is raised but not resolved — tests validator fail path, not full lifecycle.
_validator-test-note: This trace produces mechanism-status :fail. It verifies the validators detect violations. Run via equilibrium unit tests, not the fixture suite.

events._note: raise_dispute is a valid buyer action and succeeds. adversarial?:true means this is classified as attack-attempt AND attack-success when accepted.

theory.claim: An adversarial event that is accepted by the protocol produces attack-successes > 0, which falsifies nash-equilibrium consistency.

title: Nash Equilibrium — FAIL (adversarial event succeeds)
description: Adversarial buyer marks a legitimate raise_dispute call as adversarial?:true. Since the dispute succeeds, attack-successes = 1. Nash-equilibrium and dominant-strategy-equilibrium validators return :fail. This scenario is NOT included in the normal suite — it is verified via unit tests that check the validator returns :fail.
